Description: Forces immediate action to trick victim
Example: “Your account will be locked within 12 hours, act now!”

Description: Pretends to be a trusted brand or person
Displayed URL is different from actual URL
Asks for passwords, OTP, or PIN
Example: “Please enter your password to confirm your account”

Description: Poor language quality, inconsistent with legitimate brand
Asks for money, payment, or bank info
Threats of account suspension or legal action
Example: “Failure to comply will result in termination”
